srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 01 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 02 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 03 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 05 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 06 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 07 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 08 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 09 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 10 -cond V-V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 11 -cond V-V

srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 20 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 21 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 22 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 23 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 24 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 25 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 26 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 27 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 28 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 29 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 30 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 31 -cond V-IC_V
srun --mpi=pmi2 $PYTHON_PATH -u /gpfs/milgram/home/or62/project/multisensory-memory-project/Searchlight/rsa_searchlight.py -sub 32 -cond V-IC_V
